title: EndoSERV: A Vision-based Endoluminal Robot Navigation System
summary: Robot-assisted endoluminal procedures are increasingly used for early cancer intervention. However, the intricate, narrow and tortuous pathways within the luminal anatomy pose substantial difficulties for robot navigation. Vision-based navigation offers a promising solution, but existing localization approaches are error-prone due to tissue deformation, in vivo artifacts and a lack of distinctive landmarks for consistent localization. This paper presents a novel EndoSERV localization method to address these challenges. It includes two main parts, \textit{i.e.}, \textbf{SE}gment-to-structure and \textbf{R}eal-to-\textbf{V}irtual mapping, and hence the name. For long-range and complex luminal structures, we divide them into smaller sub-segments and estimate the odometry independently. To cater for label insufficiency, an efficient transfer technique maps real image features to the virtual domain to use virtual pose ground truth. The training phases of EndoSERV include an offline pretraining to extract texture-agnostic features, and an online phase that adapts to real-world conditions. Extensive experiments based on both public and clinical datasets have been performed to demonstrate the effectiveness of the method even without any real pose labels.
tldr: The paper introduces EndoSERV, a vision-based navigation system for endoluminal robots, addressing challenges like tissue deformation and lack of landmarks by segmenting structures and mapping real to virtual features for accurate localization without real pose labels.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了EndoSERV，一种基于视觉的内腔机器人导航系统，通过分割结构和将真实图像特征映射到虚拟域来解决组织变形和缺乏标志物等挑战，实现无需真实姿态标签的准确定位。
summary_zh: 机器人辅助腔内手术在早期癌症干预中的应用日益广泛。然而，腔道解剖结构内部错综复杂、狭窄迂曲的路径给机器人导航带来了巨大挑战。基于视觉的导航技术虽具有应用前景，但由于组织形变、体内伪影以及缺乏可用于持续定位的显著标志物，现有定位方法易产生误差。本文提出了一种新型EndoSERV定位方法以应对这些挑战。该方法包含两个核心部分：\textbf{SE}gment-to-structure（分段-结构映射）与\textbf{R}eal-to-\textbf{V}irtual（真实-虚拟映射），故得此名。针对长距离复杂腔道结构，我们将其划分为较小亚段并独立估算运动里程。为解决标注数据不足的问题，采用高效迁移技术将真实图像特征映射至虚拟域，从而利用虚拟姿态真值进行训练。EndoSERV的训练阶段包含离线预训练（提取纹理无关特征）和在线适应（调整至真实场景条件）。基于公开数据集和临床数据集的广泛实验表明，该方法即使在没有真实姿态标注的情况下仍能保持卓越性能。

title: An Open-Source Robotics Research Platform for Autonomous Laparoscopic Surgery
summary: Autonomous robot-assisted surgery demands reliable, high-precision platforms that strictly adhere to the safety and kinematic constraints of minimally invasive procedures. Existing research platforms, primarily based on the da Vinci Research Kit, suffer from cable-driven mechanical limitations that degrade state-space consistency and hinder the downstream training of reliable autonomous policies. We present an open-source, robot-agnostic Remote Center of Motion (RCM) controller based on a closed-form analytical velocity solver that enforces the trocar constraint deterministically without iterative optimization. The controller operates in Cartesian space, enabling any industrial manipulator to function as a surgical robot. We provide implementations for the UR5e and Franka Emika Panda manipulators, and integrate stereoscopic 3D perception. We integrate the robot control into a full-stack ROS-based surgical robotics platform supporting teleoperation, demonstration recording, and deployment of learned policies via a decoupled server-client architecture. We validate the system on a bowel grasping and retraction task across phantom, ex vivo, and in vivo porcine laparoscopic procedures. RCM deviations remain sub-millimeter across all conditions, and trajectory smoothness metrics (SPARC, LDLJ) are comparable to expert demonstrations from the JIGSAWS benchmark recorded on the da Vinci system. These results demonstrate that the platform provides the precision and robustness required for teleoperation, data collection and autonomous policy deployment in realistic surgical scenarios.
tldr: The paper presents an open-source, robot-agnostic Remote Center of Motion (RCM) controller for autonomous laparoscopic surgery, integrating stereoscopic 3D perception and validating its precision in various surgical tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种开源、机器人无关的远程运动中心（RCM）控制器，用于自主腹腔镜手术，集成立体3D感知，并在多种手术任务中验证了其精度。
summary_zh: 自主机器人辅助手术需要可靠、高精度的操作平台，这些平台必须严格遵守微创手术的安全性和运动学约束。现有研究平台主要基于达芬奇研究套件（da Vinci Research Kit），其缆线驱动的机械局限性会降低状态空间一致性，并阻碍可靠自主策略的下游训练。我们提出了一种开源、与机器人无关的远程运动中心（RCM）控制器，该控制器基于闭式解析速度求解器，无需迭代优化即可确定性满足套管针约束。该控制器在笛卡尔空间运行，使任何工业机械臂都能作为手术机器人使用。我们提供了UR5e和Franka Emika Panda机械臂的实现方案，并集成了立体三维感知功能。通过解耦的服务器-客户端架构，我们将机器人控制集成到全栈基于ROS的手术机器人平台中，支持遥操作、示范记录以及学习策略的部署。我们在仿真模型、离体及活体猪腹腔镜手术中，通过肠道抓取与牵拉任务验证了系统性能。所有实验条件下RCM偏差均保持在亚毫米级，轨迹平滑度指标（SPARC、LDLJ）与达芬奇系统上记录的JIGSAWS基准专家示范数据相当。这些结果表明，该平台在实际手术场景中能够提供遥操作、数据采集和自主策略部署所需的精度与鲁棒性。

title: LAR-MoE: Latent-Aligned Routing for Mixture of Experts in Robotic Imitation Learning
summary: Imitation learning enables robots to acquire manipulation skills from demonstrations, yet deploying a policy across tasks with heterogeneous dynamics remains challenging, as models tend to average over distinct behavioral modes present in the demonstrations. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures address this by activating specialized subnetworks, but requires meaningful skill decompositions for expert routing. We introduce Latent-Aligned Routing for Mixture of Experts (LAR-MoE), a two-stage framework that decouples unsupervised skill discovery from policy learning. In pre-training, we learn a joint latent representation between observations and future actions through student-teacher co-training. In a post-training stage, the expert routing is regularized to follow the structure of the learned latent space, preventing expert collapse while maintaining parameter efficiency. We evaluate LAR-MoE in simulation and on hardware. On the LIBERO benchmark, our method achieves a 95.2% average success rate with 150M parameters. On a surgical bowel grasping and retraction task, LAR-MoE matches a supervised MoE baseline without requiring any phase annotations, and transfers zero-shot to ex vivo porcine tissue. Our findings suggest that latent-aligned routing provides a principled alternative to supervised skill decomposition, enabling structured expert specialization from unlabeled demonstrations.
tldr: LAR-MoE introduces a two-stage framework for robotic imitation learning that decouples unsupervised skill discovery from policy learning, using latent-aligned routing to improve expert specialization without labeled demonstrations, achieving high success rates in simulation and hardware tasks.
tldr_zh: LAR-MoE提出了一种两阶段框架，用于机器人模仿学习，通过潜在对齐路由将无监督技能发现与策略学习解耦，无需标注即可提升专家专业化，在仿真和硬件任务中取得高成功率。
summary_zh: 模仿学习使机器人能够通过演示获取操作技能，但在动态特性各异的多任务场景中部署策略仍具挑战性，因为模型往往会将演示中不同行为模式的特征进行均化处理。混合专家（MoE）架构通过激活专用子网络解决该问题，但需要有效的技能分解机制来实现专家路由。我们提出潜在对齐路由混合专家框架（LAR-MoE），该两阶段方法将无监督技能发现与策略学习解耦。在预训练阶段，通过师生协同训练学习观测数据与未来动作的联合潜在表征；在后训练阶段，专家路由过程被正则化以遵循潜在空间结构，在保持参数效率的同时避免专家坍缩。我们在仿真和硬件平台评估LAR-MoE：在LIBERO基准测试中以1.5亿参数实现95.2%平均成功率；在外科肠道抓取牵拉任务中，无需任何阶段标注即可达到监督式MoE基线的性能，并能零样本迁移至离体猪组织实验。研究表明，潜在对齐路由为监督式技能分解提供了理论替代方案，可从无标注演示中实现结构化的专家专业化。

title: A General Lie-Group Framework for Continuum Soft Robot Modeling
summary: This paper introduces a general Lie group framework for modeling continuum soft robots, employing Cosserat rod theory combined with cumulative parameterization on the Lie group SE(3). This novel approach addresses limitations present in current strain-based and configuration-based methods by providing geometric local control and eliminating unit quaternion constraints. The paper derives unified analytical expressions for kinematics, statics, and dynamics, including recursive Jacobian computations and an energy-conserving integrator suitable for real-time simulation and control. Additionally, the framework is extended to handle complex robotic structures, including segmented, branched, nested, and rigid-soft composite configurations, facilitating a modular and unified modeling strategy. The effectiveness, generality, and computational efficiency of the proposed methodology are demonstrated through various scenarios, including large-deformation rods, concentric tube robots, parallel robots, cable-driven robots, and articulated fingers. This work enhances modeling flexibility and numerical performance, providing an improved toolset for designing, simulating, and controlling soft robotic systems.
tldr: The paper presents a Lie group framework for modeling continuum soft robots using Cosserat rod theory and SE(3) parameterization, offering geometric local control and unified kinematics, statics, and dynamics expressions. It demonstrates applicability to various robotic structures and scenarios, enhancing modeling flexibility and computational efficiency.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于李群的连续体软体机器人建模框架，采用Cosserat杆理论和SE(3)参数化，提供几何局部控制和统一的运动学、静力学及动力学表达式。展示了其在多种机器人结构和场景中的适用性，提升了建模灵活性和计算效率。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于李群的连续体软体机器人通用建模框架，该框架采用Cosserat杆理论并结合SE(3)李群上的累积参数化方法。这种创新方法通过提供几何局部控制并消除单位四元数约束，解决了现有基于应变和基于构型方法的局限性。论文推导了运动学、静力学和动力学的统一解析表达式，包括适用于实时仿真与控制的递归雅可比计算及能量守恒积分器。此外，该框架可扩展应用于复杂机器人结构，包括分段式、分支式、嵌套式及刚柔复合构型，实现了模块化统一建模策略。通过大变形杆、同心管机器人、并联机器人、缆驱动机器人及关节手指等多种场景，验证了所提方法在有效性、通用性和计算效率方面的优势。该研究提升了建模灵活性与数值性能，为软体机器人系统的设计、仿真与控制提供了更完善的工具集。

title: SaiVLA-0: Cerebrum--Pons--Cerebellum Tripartite Architecture for Compute-Aware Vision-Language-Action
summary:
We revisit Vision-Language-Action through a neuroscience-inspired triad. Biologically, the Cerebrum provides stable high-level multimodal priors and remains frozen; the Pons Adapter integrates these cortical features with real-time proprioceptive inputs and compiles intent into execution-ready tokens; and the Cerebellum (ParaCAT) performs fast, parallel categorical decoding for online control, with hysteresis/EMA/temperature/entropy for stability. A fixed-ratio schedule and two-stage feature caching make the system compute-aware and reproducible. Inspired by active, foveated vision, our wrist ROIs are geometrically tied to the end-effector via calibrated projection, providing a movement-stabilized, high-resolution view that is sensitive to fine-grained pose changes and complements the global context of the main view.
  The design is modular: upgrading the Cerebrum only retrains the Pons; changing robots only trains the Cerebellum; cerebellum-only RL can further refine control without touching high-level semantics. As a concept-and-protocol paper with preliminary evidence, we outline a timing protocol under matched conditions (GPU, resolution, batch) to verify anticipated efficiency gains. We also report preliminary LIBERO evidence showing that split feature caching reduces training time (7.5h to 4.5h) and improves average success (86.5% to 92.5%) under official N1.5 head-only training, and that SaiVLA0 reaches 99.0% mean success.
tldr: The paper proposes a neuroscience-inspired tripartite architecture (Cerebrum-Pons-Cerebellum) for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) systems, emphasizing modularity, compute-awareness, and real-time control. It claims efficiency gains and improved performance in robotic tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种受神经科学启发的三重架构（大脑-脑桥-小脑）用于视觉-语言-动作（VLA）系统，强调模块化、计算感知和实时控制，并声称在机器人任务中提高了效率和性能。
summary_zh:
我们通过神经科学启发的三元架构重新审视视觉-语言-动作系统。生物机制上，大脑皮层（Cerebrum）提供稳定的高级多模态先验并保持冻结；脑桥适配器（Pons Adapter）将这些皮层特征与实时本体感觉输入整合，将意图编译为可执行的指令令牌；小脑模块（ParaCAT）则通过滞后/指数移动平均/温度/熵机制实现快速并行的在线分类解码以确保稳定性。固定比率调度与双阶段特征缓存使系统具备计算感知与可复现性。受主动注视视觉启发，我们通过标定投影将手腕感兴趣区域几何绑定至末端执行器，提供运动稳定的高分辨率视图，该视图对细微姿态变化敏感，同时与主视角的全局上下文形成互补。

该设计采用模块化架构：升级大脑皮层仅需重新训练脑桥适配器；更换机器人只需训练小脑模块；仅针对小脑的强化学习可在不触及高层语义的情况下优化控制。作为概念与协议论文，我们在匹配条件（GPU、分辨率、批次）下提出时序验证协议以确认预期效率提升。初步LIBERO实验表明：在官方N1.5头部训练条件下，分离式特征缓存将训练时间从7.5小时缩短至4.5小时，平均成功率从86.5%提升至92.5%；SaiVLA0模型实现了99.0%的平均成功率。

title: Long-Short Term Agents for Pure-Vision Bronchoscopy Robotic Autonomy
summary: Accurate intraoperative navigation is essential for robot-assisted endoluminal intervention, but remains difficult because of limited endoscopic field of view and dynamic artifacts. Existing navigation platforms often rely on external localization technologies, such as electromagnetic tracking or shape sensing, which increase hardware complexity and remain vulnerable to intraoperative anatomical mismatch. We present a vision-only autonomy framework that performs long-horizon bronchoscopic navigation using preoperative CT-derived virtual targets and live endoscopic video, without external tracking during navigation. The framework uses hierarchical long-short agents: a short-term reactive agent for continuous low-latency motion control, and a long-term strategic agent for decision support at anatomically ambiguous points. When their recommendations conflict, a world-model critic predicts future visual states for candidate actions and selects the action whose predicted state best matches the target view. We evaluated the system in a high-fidelity airway phantom, three ex vivo porcine lungs, and a live porcine model. The system reached all planned segmental targets in the phantom, maintained 80\% success to the eighth generation ex vivo, and achieved in vivo navigation performance comparable to the expert bronchoscopist. These results support the preclinical feasibility of sensor-free autonomous bronchoscopic navigation.
tldr: The paper presents a vision-only autonomy framework for bronchoscopic navigation using hierarchical long-short agents, achieving preclinical feasibility without external tracking.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于视觉的支气管镜导航自主框架，利用分层长短智能体，在不依赖外部跟踪的情况下实现了临床前可行性。
summary_zh:
摘要：
精确的术中导航对机器人辅助腔内介入至关重要，但由于内窥镜视野有限和动态伪影的存在，这一目标仍面临挑战。现有导航平台多依赖电磁追踪或形状感知等外部定位技术，这些方法不仅增加了硬件复杂度，且在术中易出现解剖结构失配。我们提出了一种纯视觉自主导航框架，该框架利用术前CT生成的虚拟靶标和实时内窥镜视频实现长程支气管镜导航，全程无需外部追踪。该框架采用分层长短程智能体架构：短程反应智能体负责连续低延迟运动控制，长程策略智能体在解剖歧义点提供决策支持。当两者建议冲突时，世界模型评判器会预测候选动作的未来视觉状态，并选择预测状态与目标视图最匹配的动作。我们在高保真气道模型、三个离体猪肺和活体猪模型中评估了该系统。结果显示：系统在模型中抵达所有计划节段靶标，在离体实验中保持80%的第八代支气管到达成功率，活体导航性能与专业支气管镜医师相当。这些结果证实了无传感器自主支气管镜导航的临床前可行性。

title: Extend Your Horizon: A Device-Agnostic Surgical Tool Tracking Framework with Multi-View Optimization for Augmented Reality
summary: Surgical navigation provides real-time guidance by estimating the pose of patient anatomy and surgical instruments to visualize relevant intraoperative information. In conventional systems, instruments are typically tracked using fiducial markers and stationary optical tracking systems (OTS). Augmented reality (AR) has further enabled intuitive visualization and motivated tracking using sensors embedded in head-mounted displays (HMDs). However, most existing approaches rely on a clear line of sight, which is difficult to maintain in dynamic operating room environments due to frequent occlusions caused by equipment, surgical tools, and personnel. This work introduces a framework for tracking surgical instruments under occlusion by fusing multiple sensing modalities within a dynamic scene graph representation. The proposed approach integrates tracking systems with different accuracy levels and motion characteristics while estimating tracking reliability in real time. Experimental results demonstrate improved robustness and enhanced consistency of AR visualization in the presence of occlusions.
tldr: The paper introduces a device-agnostic framework for tracking surgical instruments under occlusion by fusing multiple sensing modalities within a dynamic scene graph representation, improving AR visualization robustness.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种设备无关的框架，通过融合动态场景图表示中的多种传感模式来跟踪遮挡下的手术器械，提高了增强现实可视化的鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 手术导航系统通过实时估算患者解剖结构和手术器械的位姿来可视化相关术中信息，从而提供实时引导。传统系统通常采用基准标记和固定式光学跟踪系统（OTS）进行器械追踪。增强现实（AR）技术进一步实现了直观可视化，并推动利用头戴显示器（HMD）内置传感器进行追踪。然而，现有方法大多依赖无障碍视线，在动态手术室环境中，由于设备、手术器械及人员频繁造成的遮挡，这一条件难以持续满足。本研究提出一种动态场景图框架，通过融合多模态传感数据实现遮挡条件下的手术器械追踪。该方案整合了具有不同精度等级与运动特性的追踪系统，同时实时评估追踪可靠性。实验结果表明，在存在遮挡的情况下，该方法能显著提升系统鲁棒性并增强AR可视化的一致性。

title: Training-free Temporal Object Tracking in Surgical Videos
summary:
Purpose: In this paper, we present a novel approach for online object tracking in laparoscopic cholecystectomy (LC) surgical videos, targeting localisation and tracking of critical anatomical structures and instruments. Our method addresses the challenges of costly pixel-level annotations and label inconsistencies inherent in existing datasets.
  Methods: Leveraging the inherent object localisation capabilities of pre-trained text-to-image diffusion models, we extract representative features from surgical frames without any training or fine-tuning. Our tracking framework uses these features, along with cross-frame interactions via an affinity matrix inspired by query-key-value attention, to ensure temporal continuity in the tracking process.
  Results: Through a pilot study, we first demonstrate that diffusion features exhibit superior object localisation and consistent semantics across different decoder levels and temporal frames. Later, we perform extensive experiments to validate the effectiveness of our approach, showcasing its superiority over competitors for the task of temporal object tracking. Specifically, we achieve a per-pixel classification accuracy of 79.19%, mean Jaccard Score of 56.20%, and mean F-Score of 79.48% on the publicly available CholeSeg8K dataset.
  Conclusion: Our work not only introduces a novel application of text-to-image diffusion models but also contributes to advancing the field of surgical video analysis, offering a promising avenue for accurate and cost-effective temporal object tracking in minimally invasive surgery videos.
tldr: The paper introduces a training-free method for temporal object tracking in surgical videos using pre-trained text-to-image diffusion models, achieving high accuracy without costly annotations.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种无需训练的方法，利用预训练的文本到图像扩散模型在手术视频中进行时间对象跟踪，无需昂贵的标注即可实现高精度。
summary_zh:
摘要：
目的：本文提出一种针对腹腔镜胆囊切除术（LC）手术视频中关键解剖结构与器械定位追踪的新方法，旨在解决现有数据集中像素级标注成本高昂及标签不一致的固有难题。  
方法：利用预训练文本-图像扩散模型固有的目标定位能力，我们无需训练或微调即可从手术视频帧中提取代表性特征。通过受查询-键-值注意力机制启发的亲和力矩阵实现跨帧交互，我们的追踪框架结合这些特征确保了追踪过程的时序连续性。  
结果：预研实验首先证明扩散特征在不同解码器层级和时序帧间均展现出卓越的目标定位能力与语义一致性。后续大量实验验证了本方法的有效性，在时序目标追踪任务中性能显著优于同类方法。在公开数据集CholeSeg8K上，我们实现了79.19%的像素分类准确率、56.20%的平均杰卡德系数和79.48%的平均F值。  
结论：本研究不仅拓展了文本-图像扩散模型的应用场景，更为手术视频分析领域提供了精准且经济高效的时序目标追踪解决方案，推动了微创手术视频分析的进步。

title: PhaForce: Phase-Scheduled Visual-Force Policy Learning with Slow Planning and Fast Correction for Contact-Rich Manipulation
summary: Contact-rich manipulation requires not only vision-dominant task semantics but also closed-loop reactions to force/torque (F/T) transients. Yet, generative visuomotor policies are typically constrained to low-frequency updates due to inference latency and action chunking, underutilizing F/T for control-rate feedback. Furthermore, existing force-aware methods often inject force continuously and indiscriminately, lacking an explicit mechanism to schedule when / how much / where to apply force across different task phases. We propose PhaForce, a phase-scheduled visual--force policy that coordinates low-rate chunk-level planning and high-rate residual correction via a unified contact/phase schedule. PhaForce comprises (i) a contact-aware phase predictor (CAP) that estimates contact probability and phase belief, (ii) a Slow diffusion planner that performs dual-gated visual--force fusion with orthogonal residual injection to preserve vision semantics while conditioning on force, and (iii) a Fast corrector that applies control-rate phase-routed residuals in interpretable corrective subspaces for within-chunk micro-adjustments. Across multiple real-robot contact-rich tasks, PhaForce achieves an average success rate of 86% (+40 pp over baselines), while also substantially improving contact quality by regulating interaction forces and exhibiting robust adaptability to OOD geometric shifts.
tldr: PhaForce introduces a phase-scheduled visual-force policy for contact-rich manipulation, combining low-rate planning with high-rate force corrections to improve success rates and contact quality.
tldr_zh: PhaForce提出了一种用于接触丰富操作的相位调度视觉-力策略，结合低速规划和高速力校正，以提高成功率和接触质量。
summary_zh:
摘要：
接触密集型操作不仅需要以视觉为主导的任务语义，还需对力/力矩（F/T）瞬变进行闭环响应。然而，由于推理延迟和动作分块，生成式视觉运动策略通常局限于低频更新，未能充分利用F/T实现控制级反馈。此外，现有力感知方法往往持续且不加区分地注入力，缺乏明确机制来调度不同任务阶段中何时/施加多少/何处施加力。我们提出PhaForce——一种基于相位调度的视觉-力策略，通过统一的接触/相位调度协调低频分块规划与高频残差校正。该框架包含：（i）接触感知相位预测器（CAP），用于估计接触概率与相位置信度；（ii）慢速扩散规划器，通过正交残差注入实现双门控视觉-力融合，在保持视觉语义的同时以力为条件；（iii）快速校正器，在可解释的校正子空间中施加控制级相位路由残差，实现分块内微调。在多项真实机器人接触密集型任务中，PhaForce平均成功率高达86%（较基线提升40个百分点），同时通过调节交互力显著提升接触质量，并对分布外几何变化表现出强健的适应能力。

title: TRIAGE: Type-Routed Interventions via Aleatoric-Epistemic Gated Estimation in Robotic Manipulation and Adaptive Perception -- Don't Treat All Uncertainty the Same
summary: Most uncertainty-aware robotic systems collapse prediction uncertainty into a single scalar score and use it to trigger uniform corrective responses. This aggregation obscures whether uncertainty arises from corrupted observations or from mismatch between the learned model and the true system dynamics. As a result, corrective actions may be applied to the wrong component of the closed loop, degrading performance relative to leaving the policy unchanged. We introduce a lightweight post hoc framework that decomposes uncertainty into aleatoric and epistemic components and uses these signals to regulate system responses at inference time. Aleatoric uncertainty is estimated from deviations in the observation distribution using a Mahalanobis density model, while epistemic uncertainty is detected using a noise robust forward dynamics ensemble that isolates model mismatch from measurement corruption. The two signals remain empirically near orthogonal during closed loop execution and enable type specific responses. High aleatoric uncertainty triggers observation recovery, while high epistemic uncertainty moderates control actions. The same signals also regulate adaptive perception by guiding model capacity selection during tracking inference. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across both control and perception tasks. In robotic manipulation, the decomposed controller improves task success from 59.4% to 80.4% under compound perturbations and outperforms a combined uncertainty baseline by up to 21.0%. In adaptive tracking inference on MOT17, uncertainty-guided model selection reduces average compute by 58.2% relative to a fixed high capacity detector while preserving detection quality within 0.4%. Code and demo videos are available at https://divake.github.io/uncertainty-decomposition/.
tldr: The paper introduces TRIAGE, a framework that decomposes uncertainty into aleatoric and epistemic components to guide specific corrective actions in robotic manipulation and adaptive perception, improving performance under perturbations.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了TRIAGE框架，将不确定性分解为偶然性和认知性成分，以指导机器人操作和自适应感知中的特定纠正动作，从而在扰动下提高性能。
summary_zh: 大多数具备不确定性感知能力的机器人系统会将预测不确定性压缩为单一标量分数，并据此触发统一的纠正响应。这种聚合方式模糊了不确定性来源——究竟是源于观测数据失真，还是学习模型与真实系统动力学之间的失配。其结果是，纠正措施可能作用于闭环系统的错误环节，导致性能表现反而不如维持原策略。我们提出一种轻量级事后分析框架，将不确定性分解为偶然性与认知性成分，并利用这些信号在推理阶段调控系统响应：通过马氏距离密度模型从观测分布偏差中估计偶然性不确定性，同时采用抗噪声前向动力学集成方法检测认知性不确定性，从而将模型失配与测量失真进行隔离。闭环执行过程中两类信号始终保持近似正交特性，支持针对性响应机制——高偶然性不确定性触发观测恢复，而高认知性不确定性则调节控制动作。这些信号还能通过引导跟踪推理期间的模型容量选择来调控自适应感知。实验证明该方法在控制与感知任务中均取得持续改进：在机器人操控任务中，分解式控制器将复合扰动下的任务成功率从59.4%提升至80.4%，较组合式不确定性基线最高提升21.0%；在MOT17自适应跟踪推理中，基于不确定性的模型选择在保持检测质量波动小于0.4%的前提下，较固定高容量检测器平均降低58.2%计算量。代码与演示视频详见https://divake.github.io/uncertainty-decomposition/。

title: Unified Structural-Hydrodynamic Modeling of Underwater Underactuated Mechanisms and Soft Robots
summary: Underwater robots are widely deployed for ocean exploration and manipulation. Underactuated mechanisms are particularly advantageous in aquatic environments, as reducing actuator count lowers the risk of motor leakage while introducing inherent mechanical compliance. However, accurate modeling of underwater underactuated and soft robotic systems remains challenging because it requires identifying a high-dimensional set of internal structural and external hydrodynamic parameters. In this work, we propose a trajectory-driven global optimization framework for unified structural-hydrodynamic modeling of underwater multibody systems. Inspired by the Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES), the proposed approach simultaneously identifies coupled internal elastic, damping, and distributed hydrodynamic parameters through trajectory-level matching between simulation and experimental motion. This enables high-fidelity reproduction of both underactuated mechanisms and compliant soft robotic systems in underwater environments. We first validate the framework on a link-by-link underactuated multibody mechanism, demonstrating accurate identification of distributed hydrodynamic coefficients, with a normalized end effector position error below 5% across multiple trajectories, varying initial conditions, and both active-passive and fully passive configurations. The identified modeling strategy is then transferred to a single octopus-inspired soft arm, showing strong real-to-sim consistency without manual retuning. Finally, eight identified arms are assembled into a swimming octopus robot, where the unified parameter set enables realistic whole body behavior without additional parameter calibration. These results demonstrate the scalability and transferability of the proposed structural-hydrodynamic modeling framework across underwater underactuated and soft robotic systems.
tldr: The paper presents a trajectory-driven global optimization framework for unified structural-hydrodynamic modeling of underwater underactuated and soft robotic systems, validated on multibody mechanisms and octopus-inspired soft arms.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于轨迹驱动的全局优化框架，用于水下欠驱动和软体机器人系统的统一结构-流体动力学建模，并在多体机构和章鱼启发的软臂上进行了验证。
summary_zh: 水下机器人被广泛应用于海洋探索与作业领域。欠驱动机构在水下环境中具有显著优势，其执行器数量的减少不仅降低了电机泄漏风险，还引入了固有的机械顺应性。然而，水下欠驱动与软体机器人系统的精确建模仍面临挑战，因为这需要辨识高维度的内部结构参数与外部流体动力学参数。本研究提出一种基于轨迹驱动的全局优化框架，用于实现水下多体系统的结构-流体动力学统一建模。受协方差矩阵自适应进化策略（CMA-ES）启发，该方法通过仿真与实验运动数据的轨迹级匹配，同步辨识耦合的内部弹性参数、阻尼参数及分布式流体动力学参数，从而实现对水下欠驱动机构与柔性软体系统的高保真动态复现。我们首先在链式欠驱动多体机构上验证该框架，结果表明其能准确识别分布式流体系数，在多种轨迹、不同初始条件及主被动混合/全被动配置下，末端执行器的归一化位置误差均低于5%。随后将已辨识的建模策略迁移至章鱼启发的单根软体臂，无需人工调参即展现出优异的实-仿一致性。最终将八根经参数辨识的软体臂集成为游动型章鱼机器人，统一参数集实现了逼真的全身运动而无需额外校准。这些成果证明了所提结构-流体动力学建模框架在水下欠驱动与软体机器人系统中具有优异的可扩展性与迁移性。

title: TrianguLang: Geometry-Aware Semantic Consensus for Pose-Free 3D Localization
summary: Localizing objects and parts from natural language in 3D space is essential for robotics, AR, and embodied AI, yet existing methods face a trade-off between the accuracy and geometric consistency of per-scene optimization and the efficiency of feed-forward inference. We present TrianguLang, a feed-forward framework for 3D localization that requires no camera calibration at inference. Unlike prior methods that treat views independently, we introduce Geometry-Aware Semantic Attention (GASA), which utilizes predicted geometry to gate cross-view feature correspondence, suppressing semantically plausible but geometrically inconsistent matches without requiring ground-truth poses. Validated on five benchmarks including ScanNet++ and uCO3D, TrianguLang achieves state-of-the-art feed-forward text-guided segmentation and localization, reducing user effort from $O(N)$ clicks to a single text query. The model processes each frame at 1008x1008 resolution in $\sim$57ms ($\sim$18 FPS) without optimization, enabling practical deployment for interactive robotics and AR applications. Code and checkpoints are available at https://cwru-aism.github.io/triangulang/.
tldr: TrianguLang introduces a feed-forward framework for 3D localization using Geometry-Aware Semantic Attention (GASA) to achieve accurate and geometrically consistent matches without ground-truth poses, enabling efficient text-guided segmentation and localization in robotics and AR applications.
tldr_zh: TrianguLang提出了一种前馈式3D定位框架，利用几何感知语义注意力（GASA）实现无需真实姿态的准确且几何一致的匹配，适用于机器人和增强现实中的高效文本引导分割与定位。
summary_zh:
摘要：  
在三维空间中根据自然语言定位物体及部件对于机器人技术、增强现实（AR）和具身人工智能至关重要，但现有方法需要在单场景优化的精度与几何一致性、前馈推理的效率之间进行权衡。本文提出TrianguLang——一种无需推理时相机标定的前馈式三维定位框架。与先前独立处理各视角的方法不同，我们引入几何感知语义注意力机制（GASA），利用预测的几何信息对跨视角特征对应进行门控，在不依赖真实位姿的情况下抑制语义合理但几何不一致的匹配。在ScanNet++、uCO3D等五个基准测试中验证表明，TrianguLang实现了最先进的文本引导分割与定位性能，将用户操作从需$O(N)$次点击简化为单次文本查询。该模型以1008×1008分辨率处理每帧仅需$\sim$57毫秒（$\sim$18 FPS），且无需优化，可实际部署于交互式机器人和AR应用。代码与模型权重已开源：https://cwru-aism.github.io/triangulang/。

title: Edged USLAM: Edge-Aware Event-Based SLAM with Learning-Based Depth Priors
summary: Conventional visual simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithms often fail under rapid motion, low illumination, or abrupt lighting transitions due to motion blur and limited dynamic range. Event cameras mitigate these issues with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range (HDR), but their sparse, asynchronous outputs complicate feature extraction and integration with other sensors; e.g. inertial measurement units (IMUs) and standard cameras. We present Edged USLAM, a hybrid visual-inertial system that extends Ultimate SLAM (USLAM) with an edge-aware front-end and a lightweight depth module. The frontend enhances event frames for robust feature tracking and nonlinear motion compensation, while the depth module provides coarse, region-of-interest (ROI)-based scene depth to improve motion compensation and scale consistency. Evaluations across public benchmarks and real-world unmanned air vehicle (UAV) flights demonstrate that performance varies significantly by scenario. For instance, event-only methods like point-line event-based visual-inertial odometry (PL-EVIO) or learning-based pipelines such as deep event-based visual odometry (DEVO) excel in highly aggressive or extreme HDR conditions. In contrast, Edged USLAM provides superior stability and minimal drift in slow or structured trajectories, ensuring consistently accurate localization on real flights under challenging illumination. These findings highlight the complementary strengths of event-only, learning-based, and hybrid approaches, while positioning Edged USLAM as a robust solution for diverse aerial navigation tasks.
tldr: Edged USLAM is a hybrid visual-inertial SLAM system that leverages event cameras for robust feature tracking and depth estimation, excelling in structured environments and challenging illumination conditions.
tldr_zh: Edged USLAM是一种混合视觉-惯性SLAM系统，利用事件相机进行鲁棒特征跟踪和深度估计，在结构化环境和挑战性光照条件下表现优异。
summary_zh: 传统视觉同步定位与建图（SLAM）算法在快速运动、低光照或光照突变场景下常因运动模糊和有限动态范围而失效。事件相机凭借高时间分辨率与高动态范围（HDR）特性缓解了这些问题，但其稀疏异步的输出特性使得特征提取及与其他传感器（如惯性测量单元IMU和标准相机）的融合变得复杂。本文提出Edged USLAM混合视觉-惯性系统，通过集成边缘感知前端与轻量化深度模块扩展了Ultimate SLAM（USLAM）。前端增强事件帧以实现鲁棒特征跟踪与非线性运动补偿，而深度模块提供基于感兴趣区域（ROI）的粗粒度场景深度，从而提升运动补偿与尺度一致性。在公开基准测试和真实无人机（UAV）飞行中的评估表明，性能表现随场景差异显著：例如纯事件方法（如基于点线事件的特征视觉惯性里程计PL-EVIO）或基于学习的框架（如深度事件视觉里程计DEVO）在剧烈运动或极端HDR条件下表现优异；而Edged USLAM在低速或结构化轨迹中展现出卓越的稳定性与最小漂移，确保挑战性光照环境下真实飞行定位的持续精准。这些发现揭示了纯事件方法、学习框架与混合方案的互补优势，同时确立了Edged USLAM作为多样化空中导航任务的鲁棒解决方案。

title: Outlier-robust Autocovariance Least Square Estimation via Iteratively Reweighted Least Square
summary: The autocovariance least squares (ALS) method is a computationally efficient approach for estimating noise covariances in Kalman filters without requiring specific noise models. However, conventional ALS and its variants rely on the classic least mean squares (LMS) criterion, making them highly sensitive to measurement outliers and prone to severe performance degradation. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes a novel outlier-robust ALS algorithm, termed ALS-IRLS, based on the iteratively reweighted least squares (IRLS) framework. Specifically, the proposed approach introduces a two-tier robustification strategy. First, an innovation-level adaptive thresholding mechanism is employed to filter out heavily contaminated data. Second, the outlier-contaminated autocovariance is formulated using an $ε$-contamination model, where the standard LMS criterion is replaced by the Huber cost function. The IRLS method is then utilized to iteratively adjust data weights based on estimation deviations, effectively mitigating the influence of residual outliers. Comparative simulations demonstrate that ALS-IRLS reduces the root-mean-square error (RMSE) of noise covariance estimates by over two orders of magnitude compared to standard ALS. Furthermore, it significantly enhances downstream state estimation accuracy, outperforming existing outlier-robust Kalman filters and achieving performance nearly equivalent to the ideal Oracle lower bound in the presence of noisy and anomalous data.
tldr: The paper introduces ALS-IRLS, an outlier-robust autocovariance least squares method for Kalman filters, using a two-tier robustification strategy to mitigate outlier effects, significantly improving noise covariance estimation and state estimation accuracy.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了ALS-IRLS，一种用于卡尔曼滤波器的抗异常自协方差最小二乘法，采用双层鲁棒化策略减轻异常值影响，显著提高了噪声协方差估计和状态估计的准确性。
summary_zh: 自协方差最小二乘法（ALS）是一种无需特定噪声模型即可估计卡尔曼滤波器噪声协方差的高效计算方法。然而传统ALS及其变体基于经典最小均方（LMS）准则，对测量异常值高度敏感且易导致性能严重下降。为克服这一局限，本文基于迭代重加权最小二乘（IRLS）框架，提出了一种新型抗异常值ALS算法——ALS-IRLS。该方案采用双层鲁棒化策略：首先通过创新量级自适应阈值机制过滤重度污染数据；其次采用ε-污染模型构建异常值干扰的自协方差表达式，并以Huber代价函数替代标准LMS准则。随后利用IRLS方法根据估计偏差迭代调整数据权重，有效抑制残留异常值影响。对比仿真表明，ALS-IRLS将噪声协方差估计的均方根误差（RMSE）较标准ALS降低超过两个数量级，同时显著提升下游状态估计精度，其性能超越现有抗异常值卡尔曼滤波器，在含噪异常数据环境下可达到接近理想Oracle下界的表现。

title: Adaptive shape control for microswimmer navigation in turbulence
summary: Navigation in turbulent environments is a fundamental challenge for biological and artificial microswimmers. While most existing studies focus on adapting motility or steering, the role of active morphological changes in navigation remains poorly explored. Here, we investigate a shape-changing spheroidal microswimmer tasked with maximising its displacement from an initial position in two-dimensional stochastic and turbulent flows. Using reinforcement learning (RL), the microswimmer learns to adapt its aspect ratio based on its orientation and local velocity-gradient signals. The learned strategies outperform fixed-shape and short-time-optimal baselines across different flow regimes and remain effective when transferred from stochastic flows to fully resolved turbulence. Guided by the learned policies, we propose a minimal analytical model that captures the essential navigation mechanisms and reproduces the performance across flow regimes. These results show that adaptive morphology provides a robust and physically interpretable control paradigm for microswimmer navigation in complex flows.
tldr: The paper explores adaptive shape control for microswimmers in turbulent flows using reinforcement learning, demonstrating superior performance over fixed-shape strategies and proposing a minimal analytical model.
tldr_zh: 该论文利用强化学习研究了微泳者在湍流中的自适应形状控制，展示了其优于固定形状策略的性能，并提出了一个最小解析模型。
summary_zh: 在湍流环境中导航是生物与人工微型游动体面临的一项基本挑战。现有研究大多聚焦于运动方式或转向机制的适应性调整，而主动形态变化在导航中的作用仍鲜有探索。本研究通过强化学习（RL）方法，探究了一种可变形球状微型游动体在二维随机流与湍流中实现初始位置最大位移的导航策略。该游动体能够根据自身朝向和局部速度梯度信号动态调整长径比，其习得策略在不同流态下均优于固定形态和短时最优基线方案，且从随机流迁移至全解析湍流时仍保持有效性。基于习得策略的指导，我们提出了一个最小解析模型，该模型不仅能捕捉核心导航机制，还能复现跨流态的性能表现。这些结果表明：自适应形态变化为复杂流场中的微型游动体导航提供了兼具鲁棒性与物理解释性的控制范式。
